releaseNotes: Public-readiness pass: adds an MIT LICENSE and license metadata, removes hardcoded author machine paths/username from AGENTS.md, references/skill-versioning.md, and check-skill-version.ts (now uses the B2C_SKILL_SOURCE env override with a repo-relative fallback), and makes validate:skill skip gracefully when the maintainer-only skill-creator linter is not installed so a fresh clone can run npm run audit end to end.

Adds a README "Who this is for & what you need" section that states the subscription-app scope, the Claude Code/Codex runtime requirement, and discloses that third-party provider accounts are optional and swappable; registers the Claude Code product URL in source-registry.yaml.

Adds the Business Control workspace read-model schema plus a deterministic renderer/checker that adapts state/business.json and PROJECT_STATE.yaml into state/workspace.generated.json, validated by check:business-control-plane-workspace.

Wires the Business Control workspace adapter into root/runtime package scripts, audit gates, README/AGENTS/control-plane docs, and prototype query-param loading so JSON-backed local experiments stay reproducible.

Adds validator-backed Session Continuity: generated business AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/APP_AGENTS.md/orchestrator prompts now force resume/status/handoff work to reconstruct state from PROJECT_STATE.yaml, launch-cockpit.html, ORCHESTRATION.md, PRODUCTION_READINESS.md, FAILURE_CARDS.md, and git status before choosing work. Adds continuity state fields, ORCHESTRATION.md continuity handoff slots, check-continuity-contract, validator fixtures, LaunchBench coverage, and an agent-behavior eval for continuity drift.

Post-commit audit hardening: restores source-root maintainer parity for 11-star/emotional-design checks, adds package/version parity enforcement, makes emotional_design a required state lane, tightens emotional-design board and live-claim proof validation, makes Design Room versioning render/check before commit, requires exact template evidence paths, makes iOS App Preview 1 founder-deferral explicit, wires BRAND.md and DEMO_VIDEO.md into starter artifacts and agent entrypoints, refreshes runtime-install documentation, and removes stale command/reference drift.

In-depth audit pass (5-dimension review): hardens check-emotional-design.ts (derives scarcity/social-proof attestation from parsed card blocks instead of stripped text, fixing a false positive; implements the previously-undocumented spend-prompt-near-reward scan; extends dark-pattern phrase scans to ONBOARDING/SPEC/APP_STORE_LISTING; expands confirmshaming/commitment-guilt patterns; reads EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md in the children scan and makes under-13 an error). Fixes check-store-screenshots.ts (unreachable board-missing check now gated to done; count regex matches 'N screenshots').

Reconciles documentation to the real validator: ethics-guardrail.md §3/§5 now list the actually-enforced attestation fields and the emotional_design.* rule codes (the old check-ethics-guardrail.ts codes were stale); adds EU AI Act Art. 5 and California AADC to the regulatory landscape; canonicalizes all PostHog event names (perceived_effort_*, peak_moment_reached, intent_mirror_continued, commitment_made); repoints the 12 card Spec Pointers to experience-cards.md; corrects Schultz (Science 1997) and IKEA-effect (Journal of Consumer Psychology) citations; fixes the emotional-design.html curve so it renders (concrete stub coordinates), axis label, and headings.

Elevates the App Store app preview video to a first-class growth lever (verified against Apple docs: up to 3 previews precede screenshots, the first autoplays muted as a ~5-second silent hook with a poster frame that must sell on its own). SCREENSHOTS.md now requires an App Preview Video (Autoplay Hook) section and an Asset Knowledge Brief so both screenshots and the preview are engineered from RESEARCH.md (user/problem), 11_STAR_EXPERIENCE.md (magical moment), and EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md (Emotional North Star + Experience Card), and are always produced through the screenshot ASO skill (ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots / ios-screenshots / app-preview-video). check-store-screenshots enforces this and it is auditable for existing apps; adds the app-preview-hook-missing-or-generic failure card and the app-preview-video-hook-missing LaunchBench eval.

Wires the Emotional Experience System into the downstream artifact templates: ANALYTICS.md (emotion-card event catalog + Dark-Pattern Watch), DESIGN.md (three-level tone + per-card motion/reduced-motion spec), TECH_SPEC.md (Experience Card frontstage/backstage + perceived-effort step-to-operation map), PRODUCTION_READINESS.md (per-card bright-line evidence rows), and ONBOARDING.md (card-timing contract).

Restructures EMOTIONAL_AUDIT.md per-journey tables from a 12-column block into a readable 8-column table plus a Findings & Pathway sub-block per journey, adds per-journey Emotional Curve markers for all 10 journeys, caps step scores at 7-star, corrects the lane key to lanes.emotional_design, and strengthens the acceptance gate to cover Critical and High journeys.

Adds the Emotional Experience System lane: an emotionally-intelligent consumer-product design layer grounded in behavioral science (Skinner, Schultz, Eyal, Fogg, Cialdini, Buell-Norton, Kahneman) with a 12-card Experience Card deck led by the four named cards — Commitment, Variable Reward, Perceived Effort Delay, and Intent Mirroring.

Ships a Producer path (charge a feature with engineered emotion → EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md + emotional-design.html) and an Auditor path (walk every user journey on-device, score it through a six-lens review, and return a pathway to a better state → EMOTIONAL_AUDIT.md).

Adds the check:emotional-design validator enforcing the artifact contract plus a deterministic dark-pattern guardrail: high-risk cards (variable reward, streak, scarcity, urgency, social proof) require an ethics attestation, a user-control escape hatch, a counter-metric, and a mechanism-specific truthfulness proof; live copy is scanned for fake scarcity, fabricated social proof, confirmshaming, and commitment guilt.

Wires the lane into SKILL.md routing, launch-coverage, PROJECT_STATE.yaml (lanes.emotional_design), failure cards, and LaunchBench, and threads the cards through the 11-star 6/7-star levels, onboarding-conversion timing, and analytics-attribution events.
